summary: Soundboard recording with generally good clarity (aside from a phasey dip after Big River) captures a solid 1994 show highlighted by Broken Arrow, Rain and an inspired Last Comes A Time.
review: The performance is praised for its upbeat first set and strong second‑set moments such as Broken Arrow, Rain and a heartfelt rendition of Last Comes A Time. Sound quality is described as terrific for most of the concert, though one reviewer notes a phasey, washed‑out sound after midway through Big River. Overall the show is considered a good representation of the mid‑90s era with inspiring playing from Jerry and solid support from Phil.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show highly (4–5 stars) and praise the soundboard source, while a few note a noticeable drop in audio quality after Big River; weighting show quality (70%) and recording quality (30%) yields an overall rating around 4.3.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Early and mid‑set sound described as crisp/terrific, but after Big River the mix becomes phasey and washes out detail; a few comments suggest a nicer sounding board could improve it.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Upbeat, long first set followed by a second set with some vocal miscues (Sunshine Daydream, Ship of Fools) but ending strongly on Last Comes A Time and Rain, giving the concert a satisfying arc.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Inspiring playing with sweet solo on Last Comes A Time; described as frail yet heartfelt in later half.
band_member_comments.Phil: Great bass work noted especially during Last Comes A Time.
